calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: KAREN UCHIYAMA FOR PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN CHUNG
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY BOB DOUGLASS FOR DEFENDANT JASMINE COLBERT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE BY 9/30/05. FREE RENT TO THAT DATE. DEFENDANT CAN PAY $350 ON 10/1/05 AND STAY UNTIL 10/31/05, PROVIDED THERE ARE NO ARRESTS; STOLEN PROPERTY; THEFT; AND DAYSHIN MILLER CAN VISIT, BUT LIMITED TO 72 HOURS PER VISIT. DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PROPERTY IN CLEAN AND DELIVER KEYS UPON VACATING. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE A NEUTRAL REFERENCE LETTER UPON REQUEST. MUTUAL RELEASE BY PARTIES.
PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE WITHIN 5 DAYS OF COMPLIANCE OF ALL TERMS.
IF DEFENDANT DEFAULTS, PLAINTIFF TO FILE EX PARTE APPLICATION, WITH 25 HOUR NOTICE, FOR JUDGMENT FOR EARLY POSSESSION AND WRIT.

JUDGE PRO TEM:MICHAEL G W LEE ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: JOANN BRYCE (218)
